html:
Exclusive to:

The Rock Den is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It is a small cave with two eyes looking out and is frequently found in the Mosaic Biome.

It works similar to crafting stations like Ancient Pseudoscience Stations, unlocking the Critters Filter and allowing players to adopt various Critters such as Kittykits, Varglings, Ewelets, Broodlings, Glomgloms and Giblets. These pets will follow the player and avoid combat. Each player is only allowed to keep one pet at a time, so trying to adopt another one will not work unless the player chooses to abandon the previous one. This can also be done standing close to the Rock Den. Walter already has Woby and cannot use the Rock Den.

The Rock Den itself is not flammable and cannot be destroyed by any means.

Contents

  • 1 Crafting Recipes
  • 2 Skins
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

  • Giblet

  • Bulbin

  • Eets

Skins

Gothic Collection
Brooding Den
What could reside in a place so dark and dour?
Woven - Elegant
Fantasmical Collection
Mystical Cavern
What charming little friends might reside inside?

Trivia

  • The Rock Den was introduced in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update.

Gallery

  • The Rock Den in the Mosaic biome.
  • The Rock Den in a drawing from Art Stream # 4.

Rock Den

Perk
Unlocks the Critters Filter.

Source
Mosaic
Miscellaneous
"critterlab"
“Is there something in there?”
–Wilson
“Is there anything cute in there??”
–Willow
“Wolfgang hear little noises inside.”
–Wolfgang
“Oh. The abyss is staring back at me...”
–Wendy
“IT'S A MINION HOLE”
–WX-78
“A perfect hollow for nesting animals.”
–Wickerbottom
“Anyone home?”
–Woodie
“Am I being watched by that rock?”
–Maxwell
“Tis a peculiar böulder.”
–Wigfrid
“It looks warm in there.”
–Webber
“I could use a friend in this difficult world.”
–Warly
“Little friends hiding inside”
–Wormwood
“Come on out, don't be shy.”
–Winona
“Ooo, I'd like a partner in pranks.”
–Wortox
“See something moving inside, florp.”
–Wurt
“What's wrong Woby? Is something in there?”
–Walter
“Shadow creatures! No, wait a tick, it's something else...”
–Wanda
The Rock Den is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It is a small cave with two eyes looking out and is frequently found in the Mosaic Biome.
It works similar to crafting stations like Ancient Pseudoscience Stations, unlocking the Critters Filter and allowing players to adopt various Critters such as Kittykits, Varglings, Ewelets, Broodlings, Glomgloms and Giblets. These pets will follow the player and avoid combat. Each player is only allowed to keep one pet at a time, so trying to adopt another one will not work unless the player chooses to abandon the previous one. This can also be done standing close to the Rock Den. Walter already has Woby and cannot use the Rock Den.
The Rock Den itself is not flammable and cannot be destroyed by any means.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Rock Den là một vật thể sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong A New Reign. Đó là một hang động nhỏ có hai mắt nhìn ra ngoài và thường được tìm thấy ở Quần xã Khảm.
